mapper.select: select * from "h_check_inout" where username=#{username} order by check_in desc

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.receiver_id, d.manager_id, d.quantity, d.start_date, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d where d.receiver_id = #{username} and d.contract = #{contractType} and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) order by d.data_id desc limit 1

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.receiver_id, d.manager_id, d.quantity, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) as remaining_count from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.receiver_id = #{username} and d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) and d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) > 0 order by d.data_id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into "h_check_inout" (username, check_in, gym_id, inout_type, trainer_id) values (#{username}, now(), #{gymId}, #{inoutType}, #{trainerId})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.username, c.check_in, c.gym_id, c.inout_type, c.trainer_id, c.trainer_confirm, m.name as member_name, d.remaining_count from "h_check_inout" c left join "h_member" m on m.username = c.username left join lateral ( select d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) as remaining_count from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.receiver_id = c.username and d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) > 0 order by d.data_id asc limit 1 ) d on true where c.trainer_id = #{trainerId} and c.inout_type = 2 and c.trainer_confirm is null and c.check_in >= current_date order by c.check_in desc

select c.id, c.username, c.check_in, c.gym_id, c.inout_type, c.trainer_id, c.trainer_confirm, m.name as member_name from "h_check_inout" c left join "h_member" m on m.username = c.username where c.trainer_id = #{trainerId} and c.inout_type = 2 and c.trainer_confirm is not null order by c.check_in desc
select c.*, m.name as member_name from "h_check_inout" c left join "h_member" m on m.username = c.username where c.id = #{inoutId}
mapper.update: update "h_check_inout" set trainer_confirm = now() where id = #{inoutId} and trainer_id = #{trainerId} and inout_type = 2 and trainer_confirm is null and check_in >= current_date
mapper.insert: insert into "h_pt_manage" (data_id, username, total_count) values (#{dataId}, #{username}, #{totalCount}) on conflict (data_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update "h_pt_manage" set used_count = used_count + 1, completed = (used_count + 1 >= total_count) where data_id = #{dataId} and used_count < total_count
mapper.select: select coalesce((select used_count from "h_pt_manage" where data_id = #{dataId}), 0)

select m.username, m.name from "h_contract_data" d join "h_member" m on m.username = d.receiver_id where d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.manager_id = #{trainerId} and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) group by m.username, m.name order by m.name

select d.data_id, d.receiver_id as username, m.name as member_name, d.quantity as total_count, coalesce(p.used_count, 0) as used_count, d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) as remaining_count, d.start_date, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d join "h_member" m on m.username = d.receiver_id left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.manager_id = #{trainerId} and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) order by remaining_count asc, m.name

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.receiver_id, d.manager_id, d.quantity, d.start_date, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d where d.receiver_id = #{username} and d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.manager_id = #{trainerId} and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) order by d.data_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into "h_pt_schedule" (trainer_id, username, gym_id, schedule_at, memo) values (#{trainerId}, #{username}, #{gymId}, #{scheduleAt}, #{memo})
mapper.select: select s.schedule_id, s.trainer_id, s.username, s.gym_id, s.schedule_at, s.memo, s.created_at, m.name as member_name from "h_pt_schedule" s left join "h_member" m on m.username = s.username where s.trainer_id = #{trainerId} order by s.schedule_at

select s.schedule_id, s.trainer_id, s.username, s.gym_id, s.schedule_at, s.memo, s.created_at, t.name as trainer_name from "h_pt_schedule" s left join "h_member" t on t.username = s.trainer_id where s.username = #{username} and s.schedule_at >= current_date order by s.schedule_at

select s.schedule_id, s.trainer_id, s.username, s.gym_id, s.schedule_at, s.memo, m.name as member_name, t.name as trainer_name from "h_pt_schedule" s left join "h_member" m on m.username = s.username left join "h_member" t on t.username = s.trainer_id where s.schedule_at >= current_date + 1 and s.schedule_at < current_date + 2 order by s.schedule_at
select gym_id from "h_member" where username = #{username}

select t.username, t.name, (select count(distinct d.receiver_id) from "h_contract_data" d where d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.manager_id = t.username and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date)) as member_count, (select count(*) from "h_check_inout" c where c.trainer_id = t.username and c.inout_type = 2 and c.trainer_confirm is not null and c.check_in >= date_trunc('month', current_date)) as month_done, (select count(*) from "h_pt_schedule" s where s.trainer_id = t.username and s.schedule_at >= date_trunc('month', current_date) and s.schedule_at < current_date and not exists (select 1 from "h_check_inout" c2 where c2.username = s.username and c2.inout_type = 2 and c2.trainer_confirm is not null and c2.check_in::date = s.schedule_at::date)) as month_missed, (select count(*) from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.manager_id = t.username and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) and d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) <= 3) as rebook_count from "h_member" t where t.gym_id = #{gymId} and lower(t.role) = 'trainer' order by t.name

select 'PT' as category, d.data_id, d.receiver_id as username, m.name as member_name, tr.name as trainer_name, d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) as remaining_count, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d join "h_member" m on m.username = d.receiver_id left join "h_member" tr on tr.username = d.manager_id left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.gym_id = #{gymId} and d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) and d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) <= 3 union all select '이용권' as category, d.data_id, d.receiver_id as username, m.name as member_name, null as trainer_name, null as remaining_count, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d join "h_member" m on m.username = d.receiver_id where d.gym_id = #{gymId} and d.contract = 3 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.end_date is not null and d.end_date >= current_date and d.end_date <= current_date + 7 order by remaining_count asc nulls last, end_date asc nulls last

select s.schedule_id, s.trainer_id, s.username, s.gym_id, s.schedule_at, s.memo, m.name as member_name, t.name as trainer_name from "h_pt_schedule" s left join "h_member" m on m.username = s.username left join "h_member" t on t.username = s.trainer_id where s.gym_id = #{gymId} order by s.schedule_at

select g.gym_id, g.gym_name, (select count(*) from "h_member" t where t.gym_id = g.gym_id and lower(t.role) = 'trainer') as trainer_count, (select count(*) from "h_check_inout" c where c.gym_id = g.gym_id and c.inout_type = 2 and c.trainer_confirm is not null and c.check_in >= date_trunc('month', current_date)) as month_done, (select count(*) from "h_pt_schedule" s where s.gym_id = g.gym_id and s.schedule_at >= date_trunc('month', current_date) and s.schedule_at < current_date and not exists (select 1 from "h_check_inout" c2 where c2.username = s.username and c2.inout_type = 2 and c2.trainer_confirm is not null and c2.check_in::date = s.schedule_at::date)) as month_missed, (select count(*) from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_pt_manage" p on p.data_id = d.data_id where d.gym_id = g.gym_id and d.contract = 4 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) and d.quantity - coalesce(p.used_count, 0) <= 3) as rebook_count, (select count(*) from "h_contract_data" d where d.gym_id = g.gym_id and d.contract = 3 and d.status = 'ACTIVE' and d.end_date is not null and d.end_date >= current_date and d.end_date <= current_date + 7) as expiring_count from "h_gym" g order by g.gym_name

select c.id, c.username, c.check_in, c.gym_id, c.inout_type, c.trainer_id, c.trainer_confirm, m.name as member_name, t.name as trainer_name from "h_check_inout" c left join "h_member" m on m.username = c.username left join "h_member" t on t.username = c.trainer_id where c.gym_id = #{gymId} and c.inout_type = 2 and c.trainer_confirm is not null order by c.check_in desc
